title: State Proceedings (civil Actions by Or Against Government Or Public Officers)
title_en: State Proceedings (civil Actions by Or Against Government Or Public Officers)

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the State Proceedings (Civil Actions by or against Government or Public Officers) Act.

provisions.title: Claims against Government cognizable by competent court
provisions.content: 2. Claims against Government cognizable by competent court
